name: jihan-agents
description: Claude Code distribution for Jihan Agent Source.

plugins.name: notion-writer
plugins.description: Notion-targeted document writer for Claude Code. Ships general + method doc rules tailored to Notion markdown, and a notion-writer agent that publishes pages via the Notion MCP.

plugins.name: verifier-on-sandbox
plugins.description: Verifies the shell commands inside a how-to / setup / tutorial document by running them in a disposable Ubuntu Docker container (colima on macOS). Reports pass/fail per command and stops on the first failure with a root-cause hypothesis.
